args.query: SELECT gmap_id, name, description FROM business_description WHERE LOWER(description) LIKE '%massage%' AND LOWER(description) LIKE '%therapy%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT gmap_id, name, description FROM business_description WHERE LOWER(description) LIKE '%massage%' AND LOWER(description) LIKE '%therapy%';

args.query: SELECT gmap_id, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating FROM review GROUP BY gmap_id HAVING AVG(rating) >= 4.0;

exec_args.sql: SELECT gmap_id, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating FROM review GROUP BY gmap_id HAVING AVG(rating) >= 4.0;

args.query: SELECT gmap_id, name, description FROM business_description WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE '%massage%' OR LOWER(description) LIKE '%massage%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT gmap_id, name, description FROM business_description WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE '%massage%' OR LOWER(description) LIKE '%massage%';

args.code:
import json, pandas as pd

df_m = pd.DataFrame(var_call_YFlW6lmXaYM46Z3Kyz9di7kH)
df_r = pd.DataFrame(var_call_pjmNPgGvkt0AiqK8zswYtUMh)

df_r['avg_rating'] = df_r['avg_rating'].astype(float)
res = df_m.merge(df_r, on='gmap_id', how='inner')[['name','avg_rating']].sort_values(['avg_rating','name'], ascending=[False, True])
res['avg_rating'] = res['avg_rating'].round(3)

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(res.to_dict(orient='records')))

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(res.to_dict(orient='records')))
